title: Better Multiplayer
description: Host your world for your friends and enjoy mincraft together!
body:
# Better Multiplayer

Experience **<font color="RoyalBlue">lagfree multiplayer</font>** with performance optimization and **<font color="Gold">quality of life improvements</font>**.

Say goodbye to **<font color="Crimson">lag and stuttering</font>** while enjoying **<font color="Gold">enhanced gameplay features</font>** that make playing with friends more enjoyable than ever before.

Stay connected through **<font color="Orange">voice chat</font>**, improved multiplayer features, and countless **<font color="Gold">convenience additions</font>**.

Whether you're hosting **<font color="Lime">your world</font>**, a server or joining friends, **Better Multiplayer** ensures everyone gets the **<font color="Lime">smoothest possible experience</font>** without sacrificing features.

[→All included mods←](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mp/version/1.0.0)

## Core Features:

- **Performance Optimization** - experience dramatically improved FPS with mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Ferrite Core.
- **Voice Chat Integration** - communicate seamlessly with built-in proximity voice chat.
- **Enhanced Multiplayer** - enjoy improved server connectivity and multiplayer-specific optimizations.
- **Quality of Life** - countless convenience features including better inventory management, improved UI, and helpful overlays.
- **Visual Enhancements** - enjoy better graphics and effects without sacrificing performance.
- **Dynamic Lighting** - experience realistic lighting from held items and placed light sources.
- **Minimap & Waypoints** - never get lost again with an intuitive minimap and waypoint system.
- **Inventory Management** - sort, search, and organize your items effortlessly.
- **Better Chat** - enhanced chat features including better formatting and emoji support.
- **Server Compatibility** - fully compatible with vanilla servers while providing client-side enhancements.
- **Resource Pack Support** - includes support for connected textures and custom entity models.
- **Stability Improvements** - crash prevention and better error handling for uninterrupted gameplay.

> *Optimized for both singleplayer and multiplayer experiences!*
> *Regular updates ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions and continuous improvements.*

Download now and elevate your multiplayer experience!

---

## Performance Highlights:

**Better Multiplayer** includes industry-leading performance mods:
- **Sodium** - dramatic FPS improvements and better chunk rendering
- **Lithium** - optimizes game physics and mob AI
- **Ferrite Core** - reduces memory usage
- **Entity Culling** - improves performance by not rendering entities you can't see
- **Dynamic FPS** - reduces resource usage when Minecraft is in the background

## Quality of Life Highlights:

Essential features that enhance your gameplay:
- **JEI (Just Enough Items)** - recipe viewing and item information
- **Jade** - shows information about blocks and entities you're looking at
- **AppleSkin** - displays food and saturation information
- **Mouse Tweaks** - improved inventory management with drag actions
- **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** - navigation made easy
- **Presence Footsteps** - immersive footstep sounds for different surfaces

---

## Installation:

1. Install a Modrinth-compatible launcher
2. Download **Better Multiplayer**
3. Launch and enjoy!

## Requirements:

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Minimum RAM:** 4GB (4GB+ recommended for optimal performance)
